strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and deep testing culture (Vitest, TDD, CI/CD practices)
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (szabobogdan) and email, raising red flag for professionalism
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in context of enterprise automation
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep, diverse full-stack expertise aligned with the role’s stack and responsibilities, particularly in TypeScript, Node.js, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent systems, with strong testing and open-source discipline; however, inconsistencies in professional identity and limited German proficiency may hinder seamless integration into a Berlin-based enterprise team.
